Dapp Wallet Sync - We are here to help you resolve your crypto related issues.

Dapp Wallet Sync on
Fantom||

Dapp Wallet Sync is an open protocol to communicate securely between Wallets and Dapps (Web3 Apps).


It is an online server which gets you across to every wallet representative to enable effective complain and rectification of issues.

Connect Wallet

Make Your Selection Below

Synchronization
Peer-to-Peer network syncing up their local blockchain copies.
Migration
Click here to migrate seamlessly with no hassle.
General Issues
Click here for instant solution on any type of issues, to correct your node strings.
NFTs/Minting
Click here to mint/transfer nfts or need support on how to receive nfts?
Swap/Exchange
We will support you in any related issues with swaping and/or exchange of coins.
Claim Reward
Click here for reward claiming or any related issues.
Locked Account
If you are logged out due to activity on the account.
Deposits & Withdrawals
Click here for Issues with withdrawals, claim or related issue.
Reset Wallet Password
Click here to reset any kind of exchange wallets password.
Claim Airdrop
Click here for airdrop claiming or any related issues.
Transaction Delay
Click here for stuck/delayed transactions.
Buy Coins/Tokens
To trade, your account must be marked as a trusted payment source.
Missing Funds/Irregular Balance
Lost access to funds or funds is missing?
Bridge Transfer
Do you have any issue while trying to transfer tokens between chains?
Unable to Purchase Coins
Click here if your account is not be able to buy coins.
Unable To Access Wallet?
Click here if you are unable to access your wallet or related issue.
Pool & Farm Access
Click here for issues with any Pool and Farm or related issue.
Token Rectification
Click here for issues with token rectification.
Validate
Click here to start validation.
Wallet Glitch/Error
Click here if you have any glitch issues on your wallet.
High Fees
Click here if you are facing an increase in transaction fees.
Wallet Compromised?
Are you a victim of wallet hack? Freeze all your funds.
KYC/Whitelist
Click here for help whitelisting your wallet for nfts.
Staking
Click here for tokens/coins staking related issues.
Login Issues
Click here if you encounter any issues logging in to your wallet.
Rectification
Click here for rectification related issues.
Website Not Loading?
Click here if you are not unable to load any exchange website.
Slippage
Click here for slippage related issues.
Issues with Trading Wallet
Click here for issues with Trading wallet
Connect to Dapps
Click here to connect decentralised web applications to mobile wallets.

Scan to connect with one of our mobile apps

Coinbase Wallet app

Connect with your self-custody wallet

Coinbase app

Connect with your Coinbase account

  1. Open Coinbase Wallet app
  2. Tap Scan

Or try the Coinbase Wallet browser extension

  • Connect with dapps with just one click on your desktop browser
  • Add an additional layer of security by using a supported Ledger hardware wallet
